refined_caption: Trash bins outside the hospital building are overflowing. The overflowing bins are located next to a fire hydrant.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital building overflowing with garbage. This is not only an eyesore, but it also poses a health risk to patients and visitors. The hospital should ensure that the trash is disposed of regularly.
voice_text: There's trash all over the place outside the hospital, the bins are overflowing and it's really gross.
